connections.def: from (the reduplicated form of) 4863; an assemblage of persons; specially, a Jewish "synagogue" (the meeting or the place); by analogy, a Christian church:--assembly, congregation, synagogue. see…
from 746 and 4864; director of the synagogue services:--(chief) ruler of the synagogue. see GREEK for 746 see GREEK for
from 575 and 4864; excommunicated:--(put) out of the synagogue(-s). see GREEK for 575 see GREEK for
